title: phegopteris alpestris var. americana
intro: Phegopteris alpestris var. americana, also known as the American mountain polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Phegopteris alpestris var. americana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications for skin issues and internal remedies for digestive problems and other health concerns.
